entries.title: Central Karakoram National Park
entries.source_publisher: Gilgit-Baltistan Forest, Wildlife and Environment Department
entries.source_note: Curated protected-area source pack. Verify permits, local rules, guides, and seasonal access before travel.
entries.hook: Central Karakoram National Park is the big protected-area anchor for K2-side planning.
entries.short_description: Use this as a protected-area anchor for K2, Baltoro, and Concordia planning. Confirm permits, guide requirements, road access, weather, and safety conditions before travel.

entries.title: Deosai National Park

entries.source_note: Curated protected-area source pack. Verify road openings, park rules, and overnight permissions locally.
entries.hook: Deosai National Park gives Skardu planning a high-plateau park anchor.
entries.short_description: Use Deosai as a park and overland route-area anchor near Skardu. Verify seasonal road access, camping rules, wildlife protections, and weather before relying on it.

entries.title: Khunjerab National Park
